content.question: To what degree does Hungary's age-10/12 early selection directly cause the observed between-school variance and SES/Roma segregation, versus reflecting or amplifying pre-existing residential and social segregation patterns?
content.reduction_path: Conduct quasi-experimental analysis of cohort performance and segregation outcomes before and after the introduction or modification of 6/8-year gimnazium tracks, controlling for residential segregation and feeder-school demographic composition; compare municipalities with different local choice policies while holding central policy constant.
